report_name: Fortinet Patches Critical RCE Flaws in FortiAuthenticator and FortiSandbox

vulnerabilities.name: CVE-2026-44277
vulnerabilities.description: An improper access control vulnerability in FortiAuthenticator allows an unauthenticated, remote attacker to execute unauthorized code or commands via a specially crafted HTTP request to the device's management interface.

vulnerabilities.name: CVE-2026-26083
vulnerabilities.description: A missing authorization vulnerability in the web user interface of FortiSandbox allows an unauthenticated, remote attacker to execute unauthorized code or commands via a specially crafted HTTP request to the device's web UI.

indicators.name: Suspicious Web Server Child Process on Fortinet Appliance
indicators.pattern:
title: Suspicious Web Server Child Process on Fortinet Appliance
id: 2b1c8e9f-a3d4-4f5e-8b6a-9c0d1e2f3a4b
status: experimental
description: Detects web server processes (httpd, nginx) spawning suspicious child processes like shells or downloaders, which could indicate RCE on a vulnerable web application or appliance like Fortinet's FortiAuthenticator or FortiSandbox.
references:
  - https://www.csa.gov.sg/alerts-advisories/alerts/20260515_critical-vulnerabilities-in-fortinet
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-05-16
tags:
  - attack.t1190
  - attack.t1059.004
level: high
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: linux
detection:
  selection_parent:
    ParentImage|endswith:
      - '/httpd'
      - '/nginx'
  selection_child:
    Image|endswith:
      - '/sh'
      - '/bash'
      - '/wget'
      - '/curl'
  condition: all of selection_*
indicators.description: Detects web server processes (httpd, nginx) spawning suspicious child processes like shells or downloaders, which could indicate RCE on a vulnerable web application or appliance like Fortinet's FortiAuthenticator or FortiSandbox, as described in the hunting hints for CVE-2026-44277 and CVE-2026-26083.

relationships.source_name: Suspicious Web Server Child Process on Fortinet Appliance
Suspicious Web Server Child Process on Fortinet Appliance
